name: Patapon 1&2 RPG
description:
Decided to start playing Patapon again, and I got the idea to make a bot for it. I did the best I could.

But in this RPG, you're the Almighty Patapon (as you would be in the games). And the story would theoretically follow the events of the first two games but you're not forced to do so.

Hopefully it works as intended.

Update 1: Added the Rarepons and their evolutions with what I remembered and supplemented what I didn't with info from the wiki
creator: GilgameshNEO
